entry.title: New: BILL017(26) (Honolulu) — CCL
entry.content:
RELATING TO AFFORDABLE RENTAL HOUSING.

Amends the repeal date of ROH Chapter 32, relating to affordable rental housing, to July 1, 2027. Effective July 1, 2027, repeals related provisions to reflect the proposed July 1, 2027 repeal date for ROH Chapter 32.

Latest action: Passed first reading.

View on the council site
